description: Recursive space folding creating cathedral-like interiors with infinite self-similar arches and vaults.

operations.notes: Use abs() folding + mod() for fractal repetition
Carve spherical vaults from box structure

example_prompts: create fractal cathedral interior using recursive space folding
build infinite self-similar gothic architecture with vaulted ceilings
compose recursive architectural space using fold and repeat operations

camera.notes: Camera inside the structure looking up

screenshot_metadata.notes: 3-4 fold iterations. Use abs() on multiple axes between iterations. AO is critical for depth.
